Lake Trail, Oak Hill, TN 37220, USA
A handful of black walnut trees line the lake path here along with pawpaws
Dozens of pawpaw trees line the dam and the lake. In September they are picked clean. You have to fight critters. Access: Public.
1160 Otter Creek Rd, Oak Hill, TN 37220, USA
Paw paw trees lining the parking lot at radnor. Many small ones, but a few full grown. As of 9/24/23 most if the fruit has already dropped Access: Public.
There is a very fruitful persimmon tree in this lot. It has been maintained but vacant for years. Access: Private but overhanging.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
